items.title: t-SNE pipeline from high-D data to 2D map
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  raw["High-D X n x p"] --> prep["Scale / optional PCA to 50D"]
  prep --> affin["Build Gaussian affinities p_ij with perplexity"]
  affin --> embed["Initialize low-D Y"]
  embed --> opt["Gradient descent on KL P vs Q"]
  opt --> plot["2D or 3D visualization"]
items.caption: Preprocess, construct symmetrized high-D affinities, optimize Student-t low-D affinities, then plot—t-SNE is a visualization pipeline, not a reusable transform.

items.title: Perplexity sets neighborhood bandwidth
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  point["Point x_i"] --> perp["Target perplexity"]
  perp --> sigma["Find sigma_i via binary search"]
  sigma --> gauss["Gaussian p j given i over neighbors"]
  gauss --> sym["Symmetrize to p_ij"]
items.caption: Each point gets its own bandwidth σ_i so the conditional distribution has the requested effective neighbor count.

items.title: Local preservation vs global distortion
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  local["Nearby in high-D stay close in low-D"] --> ok["Reliable for EDA"]
  global["Far-apart cluster distances"] --> warn["Often misleading"]
items.caption: Interpret local neighborhoods; do not treat inter-cluster distance or blob area as ground-truth density.
